goals.title: Improve Technology Resources
goals.description: Leverage technology to improve city services, increase efficiency, and enhance resident experience.
greenledgerAlignment: Mobile-first civic dashboard accessible to all residents
Interactive budget visualization replacing static PDF documents
Digital sustainability challenges replacing paper-based outreach

goals.title: Focus on Fiscal Transparency and Sustainability
goals.description: Provide clear, accessible financial information and advance environmental sustainability programs.
greenledgerAlignment: Real-time budget explorer with 7-department breakdown from adopted budget
Per-capita spending calculator shows personal tax dollar allocation
Sustainability scorecards track city environmental programs with verified data
10-year historical trend analysis from OpenGov data

goals.title: Improve Community Communications
goals.description: Enhance methods for communicating with and engaging residents in city affairs.
greenledgerAlignment: Community Priorities survey collects resident sustainability preferences
Civic Actions page provides direct links to city engagement opportunities
Impact tracking shows collective community environmental actions
Youth engagement through gamified sustainability challenges
